perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts in a Costco warehouse with two women standing in front of high shelves. One woman on the right wears a patterned bucket hat and a blue top, while the woman on the left has long black hair and a pink top. (2) They hold up a box of Lenor Aroma Jewel scent beads and point towards the product displayed on the warehouse shelves. (3) The scene shifts to an indoor living room where they unbox the product, showing the bottle and refill pack. (4) They move to a laundry room where one of them pours the pink scent beads into the cap and then into a front-loading washing machine. (5) They are seen smelling a freshly laundered scarf and standing in front of a closet filled with clothes. (6) A transition shows the two women running and posing in a colorful outdoor flower field under a cloudy sky. (7) The final shot returns to the Costco warehouse with the women gesturing towards the product.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic pop music starts immediately and continues throughout the video. (2) A female narrator speaks in an enthusiastic, high-pitched, and fast-paced Mandarin voice, introducing the product and its benefits. (3) Sound effects including a 'chinking' sound of beads being poured and a cartoonish 'bling' sound are heard during product demonstration. (4) The background music remains consistent in volume, while the narration becomes more persuasive toward the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative: "就是這個！就是這個！" (It's this! It's this!) - Excited and urgent tone. (2) Hook: "日本女生身上淡香的秘密就是靠它！" (The secret to Japanese girls' light fragrance depends on it!) - Intriguing tone. (3) Functional: "不用再去日本扛！好事多就有賣！" (No need to haul it back from Japan! Costco has it!) - Informative. (4) Decorative: "10/27-11/9 限時折扣160元" (10/27-11/9 Limited time discount 160 yuan) - Promotional tone. (5) Functional: "蘭諾衣物芳香豆 晨曦玫瑰香" (Lenor Scent Beads Morning Rose Scent) - Descriptive. (6) Hook: "還不快去好事多買起來！" (Hurry to Costco and buy it!) - Persuasive tone.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro at retail store -> Product unboxing and feature demo -> Household usage scenarios -> Lifestyle benefit demonstration -> Outro at retail store.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators, 1 male shopper in background, 2 other blurred female shoppers in background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Two young Asian women; one wears a white and black patterned bucket hat with a light blue short-sleeved top and a white tiered skirt; the other has long dark hair and wears a light pink top with a white lace skirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A typical Costco warehouse with high industrial shelving; a modern home laundry room with a Whirlpool washing machine; a living room with a brown leather sofa; a vast outdoor park with rows of multi-colored flowers.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright artificial light in warehouse; warm indoor light at home; natural overcast light outdoors.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Product Introduction -> Tutorial -> Outcome -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to promote a specific laundry scent product (Lenor) available at Costco by highlighting a limited-time discount. It uses lifestyle aspirational imagery (the flower field and clean home) to associate the product with a high-end, long-lasting fragrance experience and convenience.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct presentation of product packaging, display of discount pricing and dates, and clear call-to-action to purchase at a specific retailer.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy variety-show style editing with frequent text call-outs.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video effectively bridges the gap between a warehouse shopping trip and an aspirational outdoor lifestyle through the metaphor of fragrance.
